2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.3 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 1.0.3 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/Smart-Gang/ioBroker.linktap/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5032.issue: [S5032] "lib/tools.js" found in repo but not used anywhere. Consider removing file.

5065.issue: [S5065] ".[travis](https://travis-ci.com/).yml" was found. This file is most likely obsolete and can be removed after verifying that [travis](https://travis-ci.com/) is no longer used.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>5 words). Affected languages: de (1 key, example: footer_row3); uk (1 key, example: footer_row3).

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process issue [[#163] "Migration to ESLint 9 and @iobroker/eslint-config"](https://github.com/Smart-Gang/ioBroker.linktap/issues/163)

8005.issue: [S8005] No GitHub release found. Please use GitHub releases for easier identification of the current release and consider using "@iobroker/action-deploy".

0071.issue: [S0071] No devDependency for "@iobroker/eslint-config" found. Consider migrating to the shared ESLint config.

0073.issue: [S0073] "eslint":"^10.5.0" is >= 9.0.0 but "@iobroker/eslint-config" is not used. Consider migrating to "@iobroker/eslint-config".

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Smart-Gang/ioBroker.linktap/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.4" at [package.json](https://github.com/Smart-Gang/ioBroker.linktap/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
